'''ât-m-k-j''' ('''katamkejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jog|jog]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-m-k-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jog|jog]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-m-k-j
|-
! Lemma
| katamkejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitamkejoko|thitamkejoko]] || [[word:jitamkejoko|jitamkejoko]] || [[word:shitamkejoko|shitamkejoko]] || [[word:kitamkejoko|kitamkejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutamkejoko|thuthutamkejoko]] || [[word:jujutamkejoko|jujutamkejoko]] || [[word:shushutamkejoko|shushutamkejoko]] || [[word:kukutamkejoko|kukutamkejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutamkejoko|thutamkejoko]] || [[word:jutamkejoko|jutamkejoko]] || [[word:shutamkejoko|shutamkejoko]] || [[word:kutamkejoko|kutamkejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutamkejoko|thutamkejoko]] || [[word:jutamkejoko|jutamkejoko]] || [[word:shutamkejoko|shutamkejoko]] || [[word:kutamkejoko|kutamkejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetamkejoko|thetamkejoko]] || [[word:jetamkejoko|jetamkejoko]] || [[word:shetamkejoko|shetamkejoko]] || [[word:ketamkejoko|ketamkejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotamkejoko|thothotamkejoko]] || [[word:jojotamkejoko|jojotamkejoko]] || [[word:shoshotamkejoko|shoshotamkejoko]] || [[word:kokotamkejoko|kokotamkejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotamkejoko|thotamkejoko]] || [[word:jotamkejoko|jotamkejoko]] || [[word:shotamkejoko|shotamkejoko]] || [[word:kotamkejoko|kotamkejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotamkejoko|thotamkejoko]] || [[word:jotamkejoko|jotamkejoko]] || [[word:shotamkejoko|shotamkejoko]] || [[word:kotamkejoko|kotamkejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtamkejoko|thĂŠtamkejoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtamkejoko|jĂŠtamkejoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtamkejoko|shĂŠtamkejoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtamkejoko|kĂŠtamkejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatamkejoko|thathatamkejoko]] || [[word:jajatamkejoko|jajatamkejoko]] || [[word:shashatamkejoko|shashatamkejoko]] || [[word:kakatamkejoko|kakatamkejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatamkejoko|thatamkejoko]] || [[word:jatamkejoko|jatamkejoko]] || [[word:shatamkejoko|shatamkejoko]] || [[word:katamkejoko|katamkejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatamkejoko|thatamkejoko]] || [[word:jatamkejoko|jatamkejoko]] || [[word:shatamkejoko|shatamkejoko]] || [[word:katamkejoko|katamkejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shatamkejithi|shatamkejithi]] || [[word:shatamkejiji|shatamkejiji]] || [[word:shatamkejishi|shatamkejishi]] || [[word:shatamkejiki|shatamkejiki]]
